# kUSBPowerRequestSleepReallocate

**Enumeration Case**

The system requests power reallocation upon sleeping.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBPowerRequestSleepReallocate = 5
```

## Discussion

When you use this enumeration with [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/iokit/iousbdeviceinterface942/2977171-returnextrapower], it sends a message to all devices to return more sleep power because some devices have released it.
title: kUSBPowerRequestSleepReallocate
